productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Bottom Olive Green Yoga Pants
description: CompositionGreen yoga pants made of 100% cotton, with flattened seams, reinforced tear points, printed main lable, soft and broad elasticated waist with a drawcord, side pockets and embroidered brand logo below left pocketFitComfortWash care Hand wash in cold water separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Flat dry in shade Enjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in this urban yoga pant. Made of pure, sweat absorbant cotton, this pant is stitched with flat seams and a printed label to prevent irritation, allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. With reinforced tear points, be assured that this pant will stay with you for years, while the grippy garment ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. The soft waistband with a drawcord allows you to customise the fit. Team this with urban yoga t-shirts and tops for that ultimate in comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 43"Height: 6'2"; Waist: 32"; Hips: 35"
